5.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers due to security risks. Use 'fgets' instead.]

7.reason: [Loop condition may skip the last character if it's not part of a '-' pattern, leading to incomplete output. Also, if the string ends with '-', accessing a[toa+1] may go out of bounds.]

13.reason: [Incorrect range checks: e.g., for digits, it checks a[toa-1]>=48 and a[toa+1]<=57 but doesn't ensure both are digits. Should check both characters are in the same category (e.g., both digits). Also, uses <= instead of < for expansion condition per problem requirements.]

14.reason: [This prints from a[toa-1] to a[toa+1]-1, but per problem, should print from a[toa-1]+1 to a[toa+1]-1 (i.e., exclude the endpoints which are already printed or handled). Also, if condition used <=, this loop may run when it shouldn't.]
